---
output: github_document
---

<!-- SOURCE for the "Climate & environment" topic page (docs/_pages/topic-climate-and-environment.md).
     Self-contained & independently editable: change the intro/footer prose or
     the R chunk however you like. The list is built from the links.csv rows whose
     topic == "climate-and-environment". Build with data-raw/scripts/render.R (knit_root_dir = root). -->

[&larr; All publication topics](https://ftsiboe.github.io/ftsiboe/publications/)

```{r climate-and-environment, echo=FALSE, results="asis"}
topic <- "climate-and-environment"   # this page's topic key (see publication_category in docs/_config.yml)

## read every area manifest, keep this topic's rows
csvs <- list.files("data-raw/publications", pattern = "^links\\.csv$", recursive = TRUE, full.names = TRUE)
m <- do.call(rbind, lapply(csvs, function(f) utils::read.csv(f, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)[, c("topic","file","url")]))
m <- m[m$topic == topic & nzchar(m$file), , drop = FALSE]

## turn "OUTLET YYYY[-n] - Authors - Title.pdf" into a citation + Full-text link
cite_one <- function(fname, url) {
  stem    <- sub("\\.pdf$", "", fname, ignore.case = TRUE)
  parts   <- trimws(strsplit(stem, " - ", fixed = TRUE)[[1]])
  vtok    <- parts[1]
  yr      <- regmatches(vtok, regexpr("(19|20)[0-9]{2}", vtok))
  title   <- parts[length(parts)]
  authors <- if (length(parts) >= 3) parts[2] else ""
  venue   <- sub("\\s+[0-9]{4}.*$", "", vtok)
  s <- paste0(if (nzchar(authors)) paste0(authors, " ") else "",
              if (length(yr)) sprintf("(%s). ", yr) else "",
              sprintf("“%s.” *%s*.", title, venue))
  if (nzchar(url)) s <- paste0(s, " [Full text](", url, ")")
  list(year = if (length(yr)) as.integer(yr) else 0L, md = s)
}

if (nrow(m) == 0) {
  cat("*(no publications in this topic yet)*\n")
} else {
  recs <- Map(cite_one, m$file, m$url)
  recs <- recs[order(vapply(recs, function(x) x$year, numeric(1)), decreasing = TRUE)]
  for (r in recs) cat("- ", r$md, "\n", sep = "")
}
```

[&larr; All publication topics](https://ftsiboe.github.io/ftsiboe/publications/)
